_provenance: Prod stored-course FeatureCollection for Pine Valley hole 9 (par 4, ~554y derived) — captured read-only 2026-07-18 for the all-courses tee-selector audit (specs/caddie-yardage-selector-p0-plan.md Lead 2). The clearest Class A bogus-bend-cap conviction: mapped corner at ~175y, but the ONLY tree hazards satisfying the OLD (unbounded) corner_trees filter carry_yards>=155 sit 280-405y past the corner (i.e. clustered near the green on a 554y hole) — nothing actually guards the corner itself. BEFORE the fix this capped the drive to a 9-iron/7-iron; AFTER the CORNER_TREE_FORWARD_YDS=40 bound, none of those trees qualify and the drive is uncapped.

green_slope.description: Green slopes severely toward the northeast
